dashboards.title: Usage Insights - 3 - Query Errors
parse_errors: query=topk(10, sum by (username) (count_over_time({instance_type="grafana"} |= "data-request" |~ `error=".+"` |~ "$search" | regexp `username=(?P<username>[^ ]+ )` [$__range]))): 1:71: parse error: unexpected character: '|'

query=topk(20, sum by (dashboardName, folderName) (
    count_over_time({instance_type="grafana"} 
        |= "data-request" |~ `error=".+"` |~ "$search" != "dashboardId=0"
        | regexp `folderName=(?P<folderName>.+) dashboardName=(?P<dashboardName>.+) dashboardId=`
        | label_format dashboardName=`{{replace "\"" "" .dashboardName}}`
        | label_format folderName=`{{replace "\"" "" .folderName}}`
[$__range]))): 3:9: parse error: unexpected character: '|'

query=topk(10, sum by (name, id) (
    count_over_time({instance_type="grafana"} 
        |= "data-request" |~ `error=".+"` |~ "$search" !="-- Mixed --" != "-- Grafana --"
        | regexp `datasourceName=(?P<name>.+) datasourceId=(?P<id>.+) datasourceType=(?P<type>.+)`
        | label_format name=`{{replace "\"" "" .name}}`
[$__range]))): 3:9: parse error: unexpected character: '|'
